/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmini_cuda_llm_cuda.so -o libmini_cuda_llm_cuda.so CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm_cuda.dir/src/vector_add.cu.o CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm_cuda.dir/cmake_device_link.o  /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
